response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) at Stripe, but the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer in AI strategy requiring ~15 years and recognized AI expertise. Resume shows roughly 13-16 years depending on counting, no advanced AI degree, no demonstrated AI products/platforms, no cloud/AI strategic advisory experience, and no evidence of director-level IC influence. Profile is misaligned with the AI strategy mandate.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded
Recent AI-adjacent work on MCP and agentic tooling at Stripe
Track record of teaching, talks, and open-source community building
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Lacks cloud/AI strategic advisory or principal-level IC scope
No advanced degree in AI and limited depth in ML beyond recent tooling work

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and built AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level Principal IC scope
Recent MCP/agentic infrastructure exposure at Stripe
